rationale: The citing paper references Bradlow, Hu, and Ho (2004) only in the General Discussion/Future Research section as an example of a Bayesian approach to imputing missing information. The paper's main theory, hypotheses, and experiments focus on egocentric anchoring in online review persuasion and do not build on the cited paper's conjoint-imputation model, data, or estimation method. Because the citation serves as a brief contextual pointer rather than a functional input to the study's framing or tests, its role is mention-level.
